examples: I let a salesclerk fool me into buying a discontinued model.
What I dislike most is the word "No problem" replies from salesclerk.
When the students were free to mimic the smiles, their judgments were not affected by what the salesclerk was doing.
The polite smile offered by a bored salesclerk (or by someone hearing a joke for the 100th time) pulls up the lips but, literally, stops there.
During his two-month tenure as a salesclerk at Home Depot, Rekson made his mark by repeatedly spilling boxes of nails on the floor and accidentally banging into customers with large pieces of lumber.
